message:
feat(notify): expand event types and enrich webhook payload template

Add new notification event types and helper constructors for broader
lifecycle coverage, and upgrade the default webhook template to emit
a richer JSON payload that downstream consumers (Slack bots, dashboards,
alerting pipelines) can filter and route on without parsing the message
string.

New event types and constructors:
- EventError / NewErrorEvent: generic error notifications distinct
  from agent-specific errors, for infrastructure-level issues
- EventAgentStarted / NewAgentStartedEvent: fires when an agent
  process begins execution (complements existing crashed/restarted)
- EventBeadAssigned / NewBeadAssignedEvent: tracks bead → agent
  assignment with bead_id and bead_title in Details map
- EventBeadCompleted / NewBeadCompletedEvent: tracks bead completion
  with the same structured details

Webhook template improvements:
- Default template now includes session, pane, agent, agent_type,
  bead_id (extracted via detail helper), timestamp, and a full
  details JSON object
- New template functions: `detail` (safe key lookup into Details map)
  and `jsonMap` (serializes Details map to JSON object string)
- Both the DefaultConfig and the sendWebhook fallback template are
  kept in sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
